name: Zog
description: Deploy the full Zog streaming stack (web, backend, proxy, docs) on Railway.
author: Zog

variables.name: VITE_TMDB_READ_API_KEY
variables.description: TMDB API read access token (required). Get it at https://www.themoviedb.org/settings/api

variables.name: TMDB_API_KEY
variables.description: Same as VITE_TMDB_READ_API_KEY (required for backend metadata).

variables.name: CRYPTO_SECRET
variables.description: Secret for JWT sessions. Generate with: openssl rand -base64 32

variables.name: VITE_BACKEND_URL
variables.description: Public URL of the Zog backend service (auto-filled after first deploy).

variables.name: VITE_CORS_PROXY_URL
variables.description: Public URL of the Zog proxy service (auto-filled after first deploy).

variables.name: VITE_M3U8_PROXY_URL
variables.description: Public URL of the Zog proxy service for HLS segments (auto-filled after first deploy).

variables.name: VITE_APP_DOMAIN
variables.description: Public URL of the Zog web frontend (auto-filled after first deploy).

variables.name: DATABASE_URL
variables.description: PostgreSQL connection string (auto-filled when Postgres is linked).
